schema.description: A server for browsing, searching, and retrieving Hugeicons icon library assets including icon metadata and glyph characters.

tools.name: list_icons
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all available icons in the Hugeicons library.

limit.description: Maximum number of icons to return in the response.

offset.description: Pagination offset to skip a number of results for paginated retrieval.

icons.description: List of icon objects from the Hugeicons library.

icon_name.description: The unique name identifier of the icon.

category.description: The category classification of the icon (e.g., 'arrows', 'communication').

tags.description: Descriptive tags associated with the icon for search and filtering purposes.

styles.description: Available visual styles for the icon (e.g., 'outline', 'solid', 'duotone').

tools.name: search_icons
tools.description: Search for icons by name keyword or filter by associated tags.

query.description: Search keyword to match against icon names.

limit.description: Maximum number of icons to return in the response.

icons.description: List of icon objects matching the search criteria.

icon_name.description: The unique name identifier of the icon.

category.description: The category classification of the icon (e.g., 'arrows', 'communication').

tags.description: Descriptive tags associated with the icon for search and filtering purposes.

styles.description: Available visual styles for the icon (e.g., 'outline', 'solid', 'duotone').

tools.name: get_icon_glyph_by_style
tools.description: Retrieve the unicode glyph character for a specific icon in a particular visual style.

icon_name.description: The unique name identifier of the icon (as returned by list_icons or search_icons).

style.description: The visual style variant of the icon. If not provided, glyphs for all available styles are returned.

icon_name.description: The unique name identifier of the icon.

style.description: The visual style variant of the returned glyph.

glyph.description: The unicode character representing the icon glyph for use in font-based icon rendering.

scenarios.description: Basic icon library with minimal icons covering essential UI elements
Moderate icon library with varied categories and mixed style availability
Comprehensive icon library with diverse categories, rich tagging, and full style coverage
Empty icon library to test handling of no icons available

test_cases.description: List all icons without pagination
List icons with limit=1
List icons with limit=1 and offset=1
Search for 'home' icon
Search for 'user' with tag filter 'profile'
test_cases.output: Successfully found 1 icon matching 'user' with tag 'profile'

test_cases.description: Search for non-existent icon
test_cases.output: Successfully returned empty list for non-matching query

test_cases.description: Get home icon glyph with outline style
Get user icon glyph with solid style
Get home icon glyph with default style
test_cases.output: Successfully returned glyph for home with default style (outline)

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario exactly. All icons and iconGlyphsMap data preserved correctly.

test_cases.description: List all icons without pagination
List icons with limit
List icons with limit and offset
test_cases.output: Returned 2 icons starting from offset 2 (settings and mail)

test_cases.description: Search by icon name with limit
Search by icon name without limit
Search by icon name with tag filter
Get glyph for search icon with outline style
Get glyph for heart icon with duotone style
Get glyph without specifying style (default)
test_cases.output: Returned glyph for calendar with default style (outline)

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario perfectly. All 5 icons with their categories, tags, styles, and iconGlyphsMap are preserved correctly.

test_cases.description: List all icons without pagination
List icons with limit
List icons with limit and offset
test_cases.output: Successfully returned 5 icons starting from offset 3 (camera, phone, plus, check, download)

test_cases.description: Search icons by query 'arrow'
Search icons by query 'star' with tag filters
test_cases.output: Successfully found 1 icon matching 'star' with specified tags

test_cases.description: Search icons by query 'phone'
Get glyph for 'star' icon with 'solid' style
Get glyph for 'arrow-right' icon with 'outline' style
Get glyph for 'camera' icon with 'duotone' style
Get glyph for 'check' icon without specifying style (default)
test_cases.output: Successfully returned glyph for check with default style 'outline'

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario data exactly. All 8 icons and their glyph mappings are preserved correctly.

test_cases.description: Valid case: List icons with limit and offset
Boundary case: List icons with zero limit
Valid case: List icons without parameters
Valid case: Search with query and limit
Valid case: Search with query and tags
Error case: Empty query string (validation test)
test_cases.error: Query must be a non-empty string
test_cases.note: Expected validation error - tool correctly rejected invalid input

test_cases.description: Valid case: Get glyph for non-existent icon (empty scenario)
test_cases.note: Expected behavior - icon doesn't exist in empty scenario

test_cases.description: Error case: Empty icon name (validation test)
test_cases.error: Icon name must be a non-empty string
test_cases.note: Expected validation error - tool correctly rejected invalid input

test_cases.description: Valid case: Get glyph without style parameter
test_cases.note: Expected behavior - icon doesn't exist in empty scenario
